name: Greg Adams Tennis Center
description: Come play pickleball at Greg Adams Tennis Center in Richmond, KY! There are 2 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like restrooms. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Red House Baptist Church
description: Come play pickleball at Red House Baptist Church in Richmond, KY! There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are private. Players have access to restrooms.

name: Telford Community Center YMCA
description: Telford Community Center YMCA is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Richmond, KY. There are 3 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. The courts can be reserved.
